title.en: Assessment area plot (FerryBox track, rivers, waterbodies)

description.en: Generate a map plot showing FerryBox sampling track and optional river outlets and waterbody polygons. Returns a PNG.

links.title: GitHub repo of NIVA AquaINFRA tools

ferrybox_csv.title: ferrybox_csv
ferrybox_csv.description: Path or URL to FerryBox CSV with coordinates (latitude/longitude).

river_csv.title: river_csv
river_csv.description: Optional river/logger CSV with coordinates and a label column. Use NULL or omit if not provided.

waterbody_shp.title: waterbody_shp
waterbody_shp.description: Optional path to waterbody shapefile (sf readable). Use NULL or omit if not provided.

river_label_col.title: river_label_col
river_label_col.description: Optional column name used for river labels (default is 'river', fallback 'station_name').
